findings.description: Section s1 covers four property configuration tables (a through d), including section d) BasicDbAccessExceptionFactory which has a required `sql` property. The property name `sql` is absent from the s1 hints array, despite being a required property that users would search for.
findings.source_evidence: Source section d): `sql(必須) | データベースへの接続が有効かどうかを問い合わせるためのSQL文を設定する。`
